== Notes for [[Item:Q99622|Q99622]] ==

According to Moshe Gil, "Yusuf" ben Abdallah ibn Salam was named such by Prophet Muhammed (pbuh). Yusuf transmitted his traditions (hadith) in the name of his grandmother named "Umm Ma'qil".

"Jews in Islamic Countries in the Middle Ages", Page 298, Volume 28 of Etudes sur le judaïsme médiéval, by Moshe Gil, David Strassler, Publisher BRILL, 2004, [ ISBN 900413882X, 9789004138827 ]

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
67051AD78180A1EFBBFA9822EF79916CC2EC
geni:6000000019174824800

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
